content:
🚀 AutoGPT | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automating complex workflows by building, deploying, and managing AI agents.
✨ Key Features: • Create, deploy, and manage continuous AI agents • Automate complex workflows • Self-hosting and cloud-hosted beta options • Agent Builder for low-code customization • Workflow Management with block-based action connections
📖 Summary: AutoGPT is a platform for creating, deploying, and managing continuous AI agents that automate complex workflows. It offers both self-hosting and a cloud-hosted beta, empowering users to build custom agents or use pre-configured ones through an intuitive interface.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
